flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at William Rainey Harper College fell 30% between 2006 and 2009 (21.0% → 14.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at William Rainey Harper College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at William Rainey Harper College are 25% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($48.1k vs $38.4k).
